description_long: This is a small, cylindrical red can with a metallic top and bottom, featuring the iconic Coca-Cola branding in white script along its side. The can is made of aluminum and has a glossy, reflective surface, with a pull-tab opening mechanism on the top. One side displays the large Coca-Cola logo, while the opposite side features a white silhouette of the classic Coca-Cola glass bottle and additional branding. The back of the can includes detailed nutritional information, volume (200 ml), and a barcode, all printed in white. The can's compact size and familiar design make it easily recognizable as a soft drink container commonly found in urban environments. The overall appearance is sleek, modern, and designed for single-use beverage consumption.
description: A small, glossy red Coca-Cola can with white branding, a metallic pull-tab top, and detailed nutritional labeling on the back. The can is compact, cylindrical, and instantly recognizable as a soft drink container.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, white Coca-Cola script logo on a red background and the metallic pull-tab top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the edge of the Coca-Cola logo and a white silhouette of the classic Coca-Cola bottle.
description_view_2: Rear side view highlighting the white bottle silhouette, partial nutritional information, and additional branding.
description_view_3: Back view featuring the full nutritional facts panel, barcode, and product volume details in white text.
attribute_brand_logo: Coca-Cola logo in white script, prominently displayed on the front and side of the can, with a white bottle silhouette and additional branding on the back. Dominant colors are white and red.
attribute_flavor_indication: No explicit flavor indicated; standard Coca-Cola branding and color scheme suggest classic flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back of the can, including a nutrition facts panel and product volume.
